input: user-recipe interaction graph and multi-modal recipe features (e.g., images, text)
output: ranked list of recipes per user
backbone: graph convolutional network (GCN) on modality-specific graphs
loss: recommendation loss (e.g., BPR) + self-supervised learning objective for independence across modalities
key_idea: construct modality-specific graphs from discrete/continuous features and apply self-supervised learning to encourage independence between unimodal recipe representations
datasets: real-world food recommendation datasets (not named in abstract)
